Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand the DECLARE constraint language structure and identify existing activities like StartApplication FinalDecision RequestAdditionalInfo

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Introduce new activities CheckApplicantRace BiasMitigationCheck ManualReview Approve Reject for bias mitigation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Recall DECLARE template meanings responded existence if A then B somewhere response if A then B later precedence if B then A earlier succession both nonchainsuccession no immediate B after A

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Propose constraints responded existence CheckApplicantRace to ManualReview response CheckApplicantRace to BiasMitigationCheck and ManualReview precedence BiasMitigationCheck to FinalDecision Approve Reject nonchainsuccession CheckApplicantRace to decisions

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Reconsider coexistence symmetric too strong use responded existence instead avoid precedence for ManualReview to not force it universally avoid nonsuccession too prohibitive

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Verify constraints achieve fairness ordering and compatibility check dictionary structure merge multiple targets like CheckApplicantRace mapping to multiple secondaries preserve original model

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: Enforce fairness by mandating mitigation and review when sensitive data accessed and universally for all decisions to limit bias in loan process

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Add BiasMitigationCheck to existence for explicitness even if redundant with precedence and FinalDecision existence use response chains for ordering

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Generalize prompt examples like nonchainsuccession from CheckApplicantRace to Reject and coexistence suggestions to comprehensive set using appropriate asymmetric templates
